title: Where Every Bird Is Bold To Go,
content:
Where every bird is bold to go,
    And bees abashless play,
    The foreigner before he knocks
    Must thrust the tears away.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Emily Elizabeth Dickinson delivers a powerful performance in "Where Every Bird Is Bold To Go,"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
